# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 223. Bids & Contracts for Highway Projects
##### § 223.006 — Contractor’s Bond

A successful bidder under this subchapter shall post a bond in an amount provided by law conditioned on the faithful compliance with the bidder’s bid and performance of the contract and made payable to the department for the use and benefit of the state highway fund.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A successful bidder under this subchapter shall post a bond in an amount provided by law conditioned on the faithful compliance with the bidder’s bid and performance of the contract and made payable to the department for the use and benefit of the state highway fund.
